title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pearson India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pearson India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pearson India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Pearson India:
Pearson India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India!
